name: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Security Software Discovery - Linux
notes:
This Building Block detects usage of system utilities to discover security software discovery.

Covered from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Daniil Yugoslavskiy, oscd.community
SIGMA Title: Security Software Discovery - Linux
SIGMA Description: Detects usage of system utilities (only grep and egrep for now) to discover security software discovery


Confidence: HIGH

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
bb_references: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Security Software Discovery - Linux on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Linux OS
when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success, Audit.Command Execution Attempt
when the event matches Process Name (custom) is any of [grep or egrep]

when the event matches (LOWER("Command") LIKE '%nessusd%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%td-agent%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%packetbeat%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%filebeat%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%auditbeat%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%osqueryd%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%cbagentd%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%falcond%') or (LOWER("Command Arguments") LIKE '%nessusd%' or LOWER("Command Arguments") LIKE '%td-agent%' or LOWER("Command Arguments") LIKE '%packetbeat%' or LOWER("Command Arguments") LIKE '%filebeat%' or LOWER("Command Arguments") LIKE '%auditbeat%' or LOWER("Command Arguments") LIKE '%osqueryd%' or LOWER("Command Arguments") LIKE '%cbagentd%' or LOWER("Command Arguments") LIKE '%falcond%') AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY BB:BehaviorDefinition: Security Software Discovery - Linux on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Linux OS
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success, Audit.Command Execution Attempt
AND when the event matches Process Name (custom) is any of [grep or egrep]

AND when the event matches (LOWER("Command") LIKE '%nessusd%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%td-agent%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%packetbeat%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%filebeat%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%auditbeat%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%osqueryd%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%cbagentd%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%falcond%') or (LOWER("Command Arguments") LIKE '%nessusd%' or LOWER("Command Arguments") LIKE '%td-agent%' or LOWER("Command Arguments") LIKE '%packetbeat%' or LOWER("Command Arguments") LIKE '%filebeat%' or LOWER("Command Arguments") LIKE '%auditbeat%' or LOWER("Command Arguments") LIKE '%osqueryd%' or LOWER("Command Arguments") LIKE '%cbagentd%' or LOWER("Command Arguments") LIKE '%falcond%') AQL filter query
